description:
Login with admin / admin. Enable the Packages feature and configure the system with the following package types and product packaging records.

Package Types:
- Small Shipping Box: Barcode PKGTYPE-SM, Size 30 x 25 x 20 cm, Max Weight 10 kg
- Medium Shipping Box: Barcode PKGTYPE-MD, Size 60 x 40 x 35 cm, Max Weight 25 kg
- Large Shipping Crate: Barcode PKGTYPE-LG, Size 120 x 80 x 60 cm, Max Weight 50 kg

Product Packaging Records:
- Makita XFD131 18V LXT Drill Kit: 'Single Drill Box' in Small Shipping Box (Qty: 1)
- Makita XFD131 18V LXT Drill Kit: 'Drill 4-Pack' in Medium Shipping Box (Qty: 4)
- DeWalt DWE7491RS 10-Inch Table Saw: 'Table Saw Crate' in Large Shipping Crate (Qty: 1)
- Bosch GLL30 Self-Leveling Cross-Line Laser: 'Laser 2-Pack' in Small Shipping Box (Qty: 2)
- Bosch GLL30 Self-Leveling Cross-Line Laser: 'Laser Case' in Medium Shipping Box (Qty: 8)
- Irwin Marples M444 6-Piece Chisel Set: 'Chisel 3-Pack' in Small Shipping Box (Qty: 3)
- Irwin Marples M444 6-Piece Chisel Set: 'Chisel Bulk Box' in Medium Shipping Box (Qty: 12)

natural_language.prompt: Our warehouse needs to standardize shipping operations. Please enable the Packages feature in Inventory settings, create our three standard shipping boxes (Small: 30x25x20cm max 10kg, Medium: 60x40x35cm max 25kg, Large: 120x80x60cm max 50kg), and configure the product packagings for our Drill Kit, Table Saw, Laser Level, and Chisel Set according to the specs provided.
